item.title: Fb Messanger Appimage [Chat & Messenging]

item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Fb Messanger Appimage
(Chat & Messenging)
Unofficial Facebook Messanger Appimage
you will need qt6 installed

cool little application just making it easier to get on facebook messanger

v1.0
everything seems to be working
it should save logins if you select it to upon login

item.title: Latest Whatsapp Linux [Chat & Messenging]

item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Latest Whatsapp Linux
(Chat & Messenging)
unofficial whatsapp appimage
v1.01
update saved login now works as intended
you will need qt6 installed

i created this to keep upto date with the latest whatsapp ui

please note i am not the developer i just made this appimage
i hope you enjoy

item.title: Kde Pling Store Appimage [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Kde Pling Store Appimage [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Kde Pling Store Appimage
(Internet Apps)
unofficial kde online store appimage
you will need qt6 installed

i made this because i had enough of logging into the online store
i wanted an appication to upload my files or download others files
not to sure if i can upload just yet but i will see when i next have something to upload


v1.01
login now saves
tested and seems to be working fine
hope you enjoy

v1.0
current features
browser things to download on any store
downloaded files are notified when finished and dolphin will open in downloads location
[read more]

item.title: Rut tien the tin dung quan 6 [Financial]
item.itunes:title: Rut tien the tin dung quan 6 [Financial]
item.itunes:author: tuvantaichinh247
item.itunes:summary:
Rut tien the tin dung quan 6
(Financial)
Rút tiền thẻ tín dụng tại Quận 6 – Gần nhà, tiện lợi
Hiểu rõ nhu cầu của khách hàng, chúng tôi cung cấp hai hình thức dịch vụ tiện lợi:

Đến trực tiếp điểm giao dịch.
Yêu cầu nhân viên đến tận nhà với thông tin địa chỉ và số điện thoại chính xác.
Dịch vụ 24/7 – Nhanh chóng, an toàn

Chúng tôi luôn sẵn sàng hỗ trợ khách hàng 24/7 với dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp và tư vấn về cách sử dụng thẻ tín dụng hiệu quả. Nhiều ưu đãi hấp dẫn luôn được cập nhật.

Chi phí thấp, ưu đãi nhiều

Dịch vụ của chúng tôi có mức phí rút tiền cực thấp cùng nhiều ưu đãi đặc biệt cho khách hàng thường xuyên giao dịch.

Những lý do nên chọn dịch vụ rút tiền thẻ tín dụng tại Quận 6:

Bảo mật cao: Cam kết bảo mật thông tin tuyệt đối với hệ thống máy POS hiện đại.
Rút 100% hạn mức: Khách hàng có thể rút toàn bộ hạn mức, khác biệt với các ngân hàng chỉ cho rút 50-70%.
Máy POS đa dạng: Hệ thống máy POS phong phú giúp tối ưu hóa dịch vụ.
Social Links:

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tuvantaichinh247/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/tvvantaichinh247/
Twitter: https://twitter.com/tvtaichinh247
Tumblr: https://tvtaichinh247.tumblr.com/
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/tvtaichinh247/
Pinterest: https://www.pinterest.com/tuvantaichinh247/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@tuvantaichinh2478
[read more]

item.title: Online Modem Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Online Modem Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Online Modem Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Bulk SMS software from www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com provides solution to compose unlimited text messages in short time. Online Modem Text Messaging application is able to send large volume of SMS at selective list of contact numbers. Company offers bulk SMS messaging program is capable to deliver unlimited text with the help of multi modems connected with PC. Easiest and fastest SMS sender program is helpful to deliver forward thousands of text messages across the world without internet connection.

[read more]

item.title: Online SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Online SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Online SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
Do you want to help jobseekers by sending bulk of job alerts to start their career in right direction? Now its quite simple! Just click on website www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com to download Online SMS software which is perfect solution for jobs consultancy to broadcast mass number of text messages regarding new openings and walk-ins over worldwide to thousands of mobile users instantly just in short time period. Sms sending application provides option to import mobile contacts from PC saved text or excel file for delivering text messages in simplest and effective way.

[read more]

item.title: Android Mobile Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Android Mobile Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Android Mobile Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
High performance Android Mobile Text Messaging application is compatible with all major android technology based mobile devices for transmitting bulk SMS conveniently. Android mobile phone group messaging application provides facility to skip duplicate numbers entries during the SMS sending process automatically. Exclusion list system option enables user to maintain and manage the lists of contacts or groups in simplest way.

[read more]

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.

item.title: Download Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Download Online Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Download Online Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
Instant message program provides option to save sent message as template for used in future require and store contact number list from mobile to PC. Bulk text messaging software is used to connecting GSM mobile phone to your computer system. Website www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com introduces Download Online Text Messaging application that helps to text message from computer to mobile phone regarding Reminders, Deadline, Events, Meetings, Interview and other messages from computer to cell phone without require of any technical knowledge. Any technical and non technical user easily can easily operate GSM technology based effective SMS tool and send text message from pc to GSM mobile phone number. Highly capable messaging utility provides option to send text message without internet connectivity.

[read more]
